scripts.build: node scripts/check-env.mjs && node scripts/gen-manual.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:dev: MODE=dev node scripts/check-env.mjs && node scripts/gen-manual.mjs && tsc -b && vite build --mode dev
scripts.e2e: JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project orider-g1 --only auth,firestore 'npx playwright test'
scripts.e2e:ui: JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project orider-g1 --only auth,firestore 'npx playwright test --ui'
scripts.e2e:headed: JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project orider-g1 --only auth,firestore 'npx playwright test --headed'
scripts.e2e:debug: JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project orider-g1 --only auth,firestore 'npx playwright test --debug'
